mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, BOARD_TYPE, STOCK_ID, USER_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, VIEW_COUNT, CREATE_DATE, MODIFY_DATE, DELETE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL, #{boardType}, #{stockId}, #{userId}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, 0, SYSDATE, NULL, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, STOCK_ID AS stockId, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, USER_ID AS userId FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET STOCK_ID = #{stockId}, BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
UPDATE BOARD SET DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
